name: Cherry Honey Relish
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Pitted Cherries With Juice (1 Can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use this sauce with light meats such as duck, pork, or chicken.
2. Yield: 2 1/2 cups of sauce.
3. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine all ingredients except the pecans and cloves in a list.
4. Cook slowly, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Mix the cornstarch with cold water until well combined.
7. Gradually stir the mixture of cornstarch and water into the cherry mixture.
8. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
